name: PUMP_FORECAST
description: Real-time microstructure predictor that forecasts P(token gains ≥50% within 120 seconds). 32-feature online logistic regression with polynomial interactions. Gates buy entries in both paper and live modes.

architecture.model_type: Online Logistic Regression with Momentum SGD

features.wallet_quality: S/A-tier counts, quality ratio, best rank, unique wallets (f7-f11)
features.price_trajectory: Gain since first seen, price slope (f14-f15)
features.polynomial_interactions: vel×sTier, vel×price, accel×buy, diverse×fresh, vol×quality, rank×fresh, vol×euphoria, whale×vel (f24-f31)

integration_points: WS feed → PUMP_FORECAST.recordTrade() on every trade
doBuy live mode → forecast gate (in pre-gate section)
training_target: Binary: did token hit 50%+ gain within 120s of entry?
also_patched: §1: ML pre-gate added (wallet trust + cached rug scores) before buy HTTP
§1: ML post-veto delay reduced from 1000ms to 0ms
§3: Feature buffer race condition (clone before ONNX async)
§4: MCTS 12.5% wasted compute eliminated (percentiles from main sims)
§6: NTM norm pre-cached at store time
